name: Caveman
description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by making agents speak like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports intensity levels: lite, full, ultra, wenyan variants.
author: Evonic

variables.name: DEFAULT_MODE
variables.label: Default Caveman Mode
variables.description: Default caveman intensity level. Options: off, lite, full, ultra, wenyan-lite, wenyan-full, wenyan-ultra

variables.name: TRACK_STATS
variables.label: Track Token Stats
variables.description: Track token usage and estimated savings per session
